description.en: The amount of rotation around the Y axis, in degrees per second.

excerpt.es: The amount of rotation around the Y axis, in degrees per second.
excerpt.en: The amount of rotation around the Y axis, in degrees per second.

description.en: A number representing the motion of the device around the y axis, express in degrees with values ranging from -90 (inclusive) to 90 (exclusive). This represents a left to right motion of the device.

excerpt.es: A number representing the motion of the device around the y axis, express in degrees with values ranging from -90 (inclusive) to 90 (exclusive). This represents a left to right motion of the device.
excerpt.en: A number representing the motion of the device around the y axis, express in degrees with values ranging from -90 (inclusive) to 90 (exclusive). This represents a left to right motion of the device.
